header: Everything you need to say yes to Desiderio

items.title: The pricing one-pager
items.description: Community €0 forever, Pro €49/month, Agency €149/month — plus installation (€890), hosting (from €99/month), and Creator Care (€490/month) on a single page for your next budget meeting.

items.title: The theming guide
items.description: OKLCH tokens, dark mode, and all 15 presets explained — plus how to register a custom preset of your own and reskin 255 elements in one move.

items.title: The upgrade playbook
items.description: How the idempotent, workspaces-safe seeder works and the exact checklist for moving to Desiderio 2.6 in an afternoon — or from €2,400 the creators handle your whole TYPO3 LTS upgrade.

items.title: Component architecture walkthrough
items.description: 45 minutes on how 17 atoms, 28 molecules, and 4 layout primitives compose into 255 perfectly consistent content elements.
